title: GEEPAS 4 Slice Toaster | 6 Browning Levels with Cancel Function | For Thin Small Bread Slice | 2 Independent Controls 2 Removable Crumb Trays Cool Touch High Lift | 1 Yr Warranty 1400W White
features: ✅ POWERFUL 1400W TOASTING FOR FAMILY MORNINGS – Get breakfast ready faster with a powerful 1400W camping toaster that delivers golden, even toast in minutes. Designed for busy households or shared kitchens. Ideal for families, roommates, or weekend brunches.

✅ TOAST IT YOUR WAY – 6 BROWNING LEVELS – Customize each slice with adjustable browning settings to suit every preference. From a gentle golden glow to a dark crisp, you’re always in control with smart toaster. Everyone gets their perfect toast—no compromise.

✅ FOR THIN BREADS & NON-SLIP FEET FOR SAFE TOASTING – Designed for small and thin bread slices, this travel toaster delivers precise toasting without tearing or over-crisping. Enjoy steady operation every time, thanks to the non-slip feet that keep the low wattage toaster firmly in place.

✅ HIGH-LIFT LEVERS FOR EASY, SAFE REMOVAL – Lift even the smallest slices or crumpets higher for safe, easy access. No more burnt fingers or toast fishing! A practical feature in four slice toaster for safe family use.

✅ ONE-TOUCH CANCEL FUNCTION – Changed your mind mid-toast? No worries. Simply press the cancel button on the bread toaster to instantly stop the toasting cycle. A quick solution that adds safety, speed, and control to your busy mornings.
description: Product Description 4 SLICE BREAD TOASTER With two extra wide deep slots, this toaster can handle everything from thick-sliced bread to bagels with ease. CRUMB TRAY Plastic toaster with 2 removable crumb trays that collect debris from all 4 slots for easy cleanup. INTEGRATED CORD STORAGE Built-in cord storage helps maintain a neat and organized kitchen countertop. VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROL 6-level browning control lets you toast to your perfect shade every time with ease and precision. EASY CLEANING & STORAGE Removable crumb tray slides out easily, which will make cleaning the toaster much easier while keeping crumbs off the countertop. The cord wrap storage is right for your counter space.

specifications_table.Special Features: Removable Crumb Tray, Variable Browning Control
